compact_for_parent: Pass 2 (architecture-reliability) | HIGH | 3 must_fix, 3 should_fix | Key: 99.9 SLA budget unproven; Regional DR path incomplete; External API failures can cascade

findings.title: 99.9% workload SLA is not currently achievable from the stated availability budget
findings.recommendation: Set production minimum instances to at least 2, define explicit SLO/error-budget model, move non-critical dependencies off synchronous path.

findings.title: Regional disaster recovery path is incomplete for full workload recovery
findings.recommendation: Document full DR runbook for germanywestcentral including app redeploy, DNS failover, secrets restore, and storage recovery.

findings.title: External integration outages can cascade into order-processing failures
findings.recommendation: Mandate resilience patterns: strict timeouts, bounded retries, circuit breaker, idempotency keys, async outbox for non-critical integrations.

findings.title: Health-check automation is contradictory across sections
findings.recommendation: Promote health-check to hard acceptance criterion with explicit endpoint path and threshold in IaC.

findings.title: Autoscale strategy is under-validated for 3x peak and growth path
findings.recommendation: Validate with load testing; use multi-metric autoscale and scheduled pre-scaling for known peaks.

findings.title: RTO/RPO claims are not operationally proven
findings.recommendation: Define component-level recovery time budgets and run periodic DR drills.

findings.title: Reliability upgrade triggers are not quantified
findings.recommendation: Define objective escalation gates for AZ and cross-region enhancements.
